app.offline: You are offline - using cached content
app.suspended: Your account is suspended. You can use the site but cannot upload videos.
app.banned: Your account has been banned. You cannot use this service.
app.updateAvailable: A new version of GilTube is available
app.securePasskey: Secure your account with a passkey for faster sign-in.
app.gilidLinkTitle: Link your GilTube account to GILid
app.gilidLinkBody: GilTube now supports GILid account linking. Connect your existing GilTube account so you can use your GilServices identity across the network.
app.gilidLinkPasskeyNote: Your existing passkeys will still work after you link GILid.
app.gilidDontShowAgain: Do not show this message again for this account.

home.title: Home
home.noVideosBody: Upload videos to populate the recommendation feed.
home.description: A ranked home feed based on popularity, channel trust, and recency
home.loadError: We could not load the recommended feed right now.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.subtitle: Track comments, replies, and likes on your content.
notifications.pushSubtitle: Receive alerts in your browser when you are away from the tab.
notifications.pushDisabledByConfig: Push is disabled by server configuration.
notifications.pushPaused: Push delivery is paused on the server.
notifications.pushUnsupported: This browser does not support push notifications.
notifications.pushKeyMissing: Push public key is not configured on the server.

modal.canChangeAnytime: You can change your language anytime in the sidebar

login.title: Sign in to your account
login.gilidPopupBody: Use your GILid account to sign in. Existing GilTube accounts are linked automatically when your GILid email matches your GilTube email.
login.gilidPopupHint: If you already have a GilTube account, sign in with the same email on GILid to migrate cleanly.
login.gilidInlineBody: GILid is the preferred sign-in for first-party GilServices apps, including GilTube.
login.callbackProcessing: We are validating your GILid account and linking it to GilTube if needed.
login.callbackRedirecting: Your account is ready. Redirecting now...
login.callbackMissingCode: The GILid callback is missing required login details.
login.callbackError: We could not complete your GILid sign-in. Please try again.

register.title: Create your account
register.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters

video.createChannelToComment: To comment, you need to create a channel first
video.processingMessage: This video is still being processed. It will be available to watch shortly.
video.matureContentWarning: This video contains mature content and is intended for viewers 18 years and older. Viewer discretion is advised.
video.deleteCommentConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this comment?

live.chatDisabled: Comments are disabled on live pages.
live.streamOffline: Stream is offline. Chat posting is disabled until live.
live.signInChat: Sign in to join live chat.
live.createChannelChat: Create a channel to send chat messages.

dashboard.title: Your Videos
dashboard.subtitle: Manage and organize your video library
dashboard.startUploading: Start by uploading your first video
dashboard.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{title}"? This action cannot be undone.
dashboard.downloadUnavailable: Only published videos can be downloaded
dashboard.downloadError: Failed to download video. Please try again.

upload.title: Upload Video
upload.clickToSelect: Click to select a video file
upload.explicitHelper: Mark this video as containing content for mature audiences
upload.thumbnailClick: Click to select an image or drag and drop
upload.dontCloseWarning: Please don't close this page while your video is uploading.
upload.uploadSuccess: Your video has been uploaded successfully.
upload.publishMessage: Click "Publish" to start processing your video. This may take a few minutes depending on the file size.
upload.bannedError: Your account is banned and you cannot upload videos.
upload.noChannelsError: You have no active channels available for uploading.
upload.thumbnailSizeError: Thumbnail file must be smaller than 5MB
upload.thumbnailTypeError: Please select a valid image file

edit.title: Edit Video
edit.subtitle: Update your video details and thumbnail
edit.explicitHelper: Mark this video as containing content for mature audiences
edit.thumbnailClick: Click to select an image or drag and drop
edit.revertMessage: This will regenerate the thumbnail from the video
edit.loadError: Failed to load video. Please try again.
edit.saveError: Failed to save changes. Please try again.

channels.title: Manage Your Channels
channels.noChannels: You don't have any channels yet.
channels.avatarHelper: Upload a new avatar image or leave blank to keep current
channels.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.

accountSettings.title: Account Settings
accountSettings.subtitle: Update your email and password, or permanently delete your account.
accountSettings.passwordTooShort: New password must be at least 6 characters
accountSettings.passkeysHelper: Use biometrics or device PIN for faster sign-in.
accountSettings.passkeyUnsupported: This browser does not support passkeys.
accountSettings.deleteMessage: This permanently removes your account and fully scrubs associated channels, videos, comments, and likes. This action cannot be undone.
accountSettings.gilidUnlinkedBody: Link your GILid account to migrate this GilTube account to the GilServices Network sign-in flow.
accountSettings.gilidLinkedBody: This account is linked to GILid. Your sign-in and account identity are now managed through the GilServices Network.
accountSettings.gilidManagedNotice: Because this account is linked to GILid, the local email and password forms are no longer needed here.
accountSettings.deleteTypeError: Please type DELETE to confirm account deletion
accountSettings.deleteConfirmPrompt: This will permanently delete your account and all associated data. Continue?

createChannelPage.title: Create Your Channel
createChannelPage.loginRequired: You must be logged in to create a channel.
createChannelPage.avatarHelper: Upload an image for your channel's profile picture
createChannelPage.success: Channel created successfully! Redirecting to upload...
createChannelPage.createError: Failed to create channel. Please try again.

goLive.title: Go Live (BETA, MAY HAVE BUGS)
goLive.subtitle: Manage your stream key and mark your channel as live.
goLive.playbackUrl: Playback URL (for external players like VLC)
goLive.publisherPresenceHelper: When enabled, live status comes from MediaMTX ingest presence.
goLive.loadError: Failed to load live stream settings
goLive.publisherPresenceEnabled: Publisher presence enabled. Live status now follows real ingest presence.
goLive.publisherPresenceDisabled: Publisher presence disabled. Manual live status controls are active.
goLive.publisherPresenceError: Failed to update publisher presence setting

moviesCategory.title: Movies
moviesCategory.empty: No movies have been published yet.

watchParty.title: Start movie watch party
watchParty.body: Public parties show on the home page. Private parties are only available through the share link.
watchParty.continueFrom: Continue from {time} from last watch party

seriesCategory.title: Series
seriesCategory.empty: No series have been published yet.
seriesCategory.metaDescription: Episodic GilTube series organized by genre.

watchParty.title: Start series watch party
watchParty.body: Start a synced episode queue for this series. Public parties show on the home page.
watchParty.continueFrom: Continue from {time} from last watch party
watchParty.noEpisodes: This series has no episodes yet.

dialog.title: Start watch party
dialog.body: Public parties show on the home page. Private parties are only available through the share link.
dialog.partyTypeHelp: Open queue lets the host and allowed viewers add videos. Single video keeps the party locked to this video.

help.title: Admin panel
help.body: Use this area for trusted operational work: moderation, streaming metadata, movie and series setup, and YouTube mirroring. Destructive actions are protected against admin accounts and admin-owned channels.

users.title: User Management
users.helpBody: Suspend prevents uploads while keeping login available. Ban blocks the account and hides videos from that user's channels. Admin accounts cannot be suspended, banned, or deleted from this panel.
users.searchPlaceholder: Search users by name or email...

channels.title: Channel Management
channels.helpBody: Suspend or ban channels when the issue is isolated to one channel. Channels owned by admin users are protected from destructive moderation.

seriesAdmin.title: Series Creator
seriesAdmin.subtitle: Create metadata, upload a public trailer, and ingest hidden episode videos.
seriesAdmin.featuredToggle: Feature this series in the Series category hero

channelCard.title: Series Channel
channelCard.body: Trailers are public videos. Episodes are uploaded as hidden videos, then attached to the series playback queue.

trailer.title: Trailer
trailer.body: This video stays visible in normal GilTube surfaces and links viewers into the series.

episodes.title: Episodes
episodes.body: Episode videos are hidden from the main feeds after upload.

help.title: Series tools
help.body: Series records control the streaming category UI. Trailers remain public in normal GilTube surfaces, while episodes are hidden videos linked into the season and episode queue. Subtitle tools edit the HLS master playlist for each episode.

youtubeMirrorAdmin.title: YouTube Mirror Import
youtubeMirrorAdmin.subtitle: Import YouTube videos into GilTube and keep stable YouTube channel IDs linked to mirror channels.

help.title: YouTube mirrors
help.body: Mirror mappings use the stable YouTube channel ID, not the channel display name. This prevents duplicate GilTube channels when a YouTube channel changes names.

import.title: Import video
import.body: Paste a YouTube video URL. If its channel is already mapped, GilTube will use that mirror channel automatically.
import.helpBody: The backend reads metadata with yt-dlp, downloads the video and available captions, then queues everything for the normal transcoder. New mirror channels also import the YouTube channel description and profile picture. If no mapping exists, choose an existing GilTube channel or create a new mirror channel.
import.mappingRequired: This YouTube channel needs a mirror mapping first.
import.mappingRequiredBody: Choose an existing GilTube mirror channel or enable Create mirror channel, then run the import again. The mapping will be saved automatically.

mappings.title: YouTube channel mappings
mappings.body: Link stable YouTube channel IDs to GilTube mirror channels to avoid duplicate channels.
mappings.helpBody: Use this table to manually connect a YouTube channel ID to a GilTube channel. If the mirror channel does not exist yet, enable Create new and it will be attached to the GilTube Mirrors account.
mappings.empty: No YouTube channels are linked yet.

messages.importStarted: Import started as video {id}. Transcoding starts after the YouTube download finishes.

errors.loadMappings: Failed to load YouTube mirror mappings
errors.saveMapping: Failed to save YouTube mirror mapping
errors.deleteMapping: Failed to delete YouTube mirror mapping

movieAdmin.title: Movie Creator
movieAdmin.subtitle: Create metadata, upload a public trailer, and attach a hidden full movie video.

help.title: Movie tools
help.body: Movie records power the Movies category UI. The trailer is public and discoverable; the full movie video is hidden from regular feeds and linked here for Play, Resume, watch parties, and subtitle management.

movieAdmin.featuredToggle: Feature this movie in the Movies category hero

channelCard.title: Movies Channel
channelCard.body: Trailers stay public. Full movies are uploaded as hidden videos, then linked to the movie record.

trailer.title: Trailer
trailer.body: This video stays visible in normal GilTube surfaces and links viewers into the movie.

fullMovie.title: Full Movie
fullMovie.body: The linked movie video is hidden from regular feeds and used for Play/Resume in the movies category.
fullMovie.helpBody: Upload a new file or link an existing video from the Movies channel. Once attached, the movie can use the same HLS subtitle manager as series episodes.

subtitles.title: Subtitles
subtitles.body: Upload .srt, .ass, or .vtt files. Non-VTT files are converted and inserted into the movie HLS master playlist.
subtitles.helpBody: Subtitle tracks are stored in the linked movie video's captions folder. Use default to choose the track players select first, delay to shift cue timing in milliseconds, and download to inspect the generated VTT.
subtitles.empty: No subtitle tracks found in the master playlist.

library.title: Existing Movies Channel Videos
library.body: Reuse already uploaded videos from the Movies channel as either the public trailer or the hidden full movie.
library.empty: No matching videos found in the Movies channel.

messages.created: Movie created. Upload a trailer and the hidden full movie next.
messages.movieUploaded: Movie video uploaded. Attach it to finish.
messages.movieUploadedLocal: Movie video uploaded via local upload. Attach it to finish.

errors.loadLibrary: Failed to load Movies channel videos

playlists.title: Title
playlists.createYourFirst: Create your first playlist to get started
playlists.addVideosHint: Add videos to your playlist from the video player
playlists.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this playlist?
playlists.confirmRemoveVideo: Remove this video from the playlist?
playlists.confirmDeletePlaylist: Are you sure you want to delete this entire playlist?
